prompts:
Convert the following into a single JSON object with keys name, age, email, city, country, occupation, and skills (an array). Output only valid JSON, no prose:

Name: Ada Lovelace. Age: 36. Email: ada@analytical.engine. Lives in London, United Kingdom. Works as a mathematician. Skills: analytical engines, algorithms, mathematics, writing.

JSON:

Extract every email address from the log below, one per line, in the order they appear. Output only the addresses:

[INFO] user a@x.com logged in
[INFO] user b@x.com logged in
[WARN] user c@x.com failed auth
[INFO] user d@x.com logged in
[INFO] user e@x.com logged in
[WARN] user f@x.com failed auth
[INFO] user g@x.com logged in

Addresses:
Explain in a few clear sentences what the difference is between a process and a thread, and when you would choose one over the other.
Write an original short paragraph describing a thunderstorm rolling over an empty coastal town at dusk. Use vivid, unhurried, non-repetitive language.

Generate a sequence of 60 unrelated, unpredictable words, each on its own line, drawn from wildly different domains (physics, cooking, mythology, finance, marine biology). Do not let any word predict the next.
